testcase.name: test_purchase_coins_from_balance_requires_auth

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 401 without auth, got 404 assert 404 == 401 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_admin_membership_features.py:191: in test_purchase_coins_from_balance_requires_auth assert response.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401 without auth, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401 without auth, got 404 E assert 404 == 401 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
